notes: Short assembly file (298 lines, 9 decls including 1 local instance) that wires together the local comap witnesses from OneSubAffineResidues and OneSubInftyResidues with the WallA covariance, culminating in `oneSubFrobeniusScaling_holds` — leaf 2 of the Hasse bound, axiom-clean with zero carried hypotheses. Several intermediate theorems (`oneSubFrobeniusScaling_of_comapWitness`, `oneSub_hproj_of_comapWitness`, `oneSubFrobeniusScaling_of_comapWitness_surj`) are superseded stepping stones and are dead code within this file.
